name: Prayer of Healing
description: Up to five creatures of your choice who remain within range for the entire casting gain the benefits of a Short Rest and regain 2d8 Hit Points. A creature can't be affected again until it finishes a Long Rest. Engine: the 10-minute multi-target heal is out-of-combat utility narrated by the AIGM (the single-target heal resolver doesn't cover the group rest benefit).
scaling: The healing increases by 1d8 for each spell slot level above 2.
